## Workflow Traceability

- Path: Quick Change
- Classification: fix | docs | chore | refactor
- Source docs: `<paths>` or none
- Allowed scope:
- Changed files:
- Escalation checked: yes/no + notes
- Validation: `<command>` → pass/fail
- Version impact: none |
- Suggested commit scope: `<type>(<scope>): ...`
